title: selago polystachya
intro: Selago polystachya, also known as Cape gentian or Blue mountain gentian, is a flowering plant native to South Africa. It is valued for its medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of iridoid glycosides, which are responsible for its antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Selago polystachya include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, and to reduce inflammation in the body. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations, including teas and infusions, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
